title: Add dark mode support to dashboard
body:
## Feature Request

It would be great to have a dark mode toggle in the dashboard.

## Motivation

Many users prefer dark mode, especially when working at night. This would improve the user experience significantly.

## Proposed Implementation

Add a theme toggle component that switches between light and dark CSS variables.

Files to modify:
- `src/components/theme-toggle.tsx`
- `src/styles/variables.css`
- `src/hooks/use-theme.ts`

```tsx
function ThemeToggle() {
  const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();
  return <button onClick={() => setTheme(theme === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark')}>{theme}</button>;
}
```

## Alternatives

We could use `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)` but a manual toggle gives more control.
